figures.caption: Fig. 2. Population encoding protocol for the CL-1 MEA. Encoding electrodes were selected from moderately active channels. Feedback electrodes were selected from strong but non-dominant channels. Drift-affected or dominant electrodes were excluded from the optimized configuration. Created in BioRender. Schottlender, M. (2026) https://BioRender.com/mbkjugz
Fig. 3. Cumulative accuracy over time for an example of the best encoding-decoding combination for MNIST with two symbols.
